block_info.label: GEMV
block_info.description: Matrix and Vector Multiplication block targeted for AI Engines.

parameters.name: data_type_A
parameters.description: describes the data type of samples in input matrix A
parameters.label: A input data type:

parameters.name: data_type_B
parameters.description: describes the data type of samples in input matrix B
parameters.label: B input data type:

parameters.name: Matrix_reload
parameters.description: When enabled, the input port for matrix A is an asynchronous RTP. Otherwise, the input port for matrix A is a buffer.
parameters.label: Provide matrix A via RTP

parameters.name: api
parameters.description: IO interface: 0 for windows, 1 for streams
parameters.label: api:

parameters.name: Dim_A
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of elements along the unique dimension (rows) of Matrix A.
parameters.label: Rows in input A:

parameters.name: Dim_B
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of elements in Vector B and the number of columns in Matrix A.
parameters.label: Columns in input A, Length of vector B:

parameters.name: num_frames
parameters.description: describes the number matrix-vector multiplications occuring per window of matrix/vector input data
parameters.label: Number of frames:

parameters.name: ssr
parameters.description: describes the number of kernels (or cascaded kernel chains) that will compute the matrix-vector multiplication in parallel.
parameters.label: SSR

parameters.name: casc_length
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE kernels the matrix-vector multiplication will be divided into in series.
parameters.label: Number of cascade stages:

parameters.name: dual_ip
parameters.description: Enable a second set of stream input ports. Interleave the input data between the 2 inputs.
parameters.label: Provide second set of input ports

parameters.name: num_outputs
parameters.description: Enable a second set of stream output ports. The result is interleaved between the 2 ouputs.
parameters.label: Provide second set of output ports

parameters.name: A_Leading_data
parameters.description: describes whether input matrix A is row-major or column-major
parameters.label: A input leading dimension:

parameters.name: shift_output
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of product terms before each output.
parameters.label: Scale output down by 2^:

parameters.name: rnd_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Rounding mode:

parameters.name: sat_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Saturation mode:
